channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: IPID Report Reignites Debate Over Presidential Accountability in Phala Phala Case
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa faces growing demands for impeachment following the release of the long-awaited Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID) report into the 2020 Phala Phala farm robb...

item.title: War in Iran expected to alter global air travel routes and increase operational costs for airlines
item.description: The ongoing conflict involving Iran is creating widespread uncertainty in the global aviation industry, with experts warning that airline routes, travel demand, and fuel costs could be significantly a...

item.title: Ten essential steps to organise your finances before death
item.description: Planning your finances before death can prevent significant stress and financial loss for your family. This article outlines ten crucial steps to organise your estate. First, ensure all pensions are p...

item.title: Saudi Arabia and Qatar extend $5 billion financial support to Pakistan amid economic pressures
item.description: Pakistan is set to receive $5 billion in financial assistance from Saudi Arabia and Qatar, offering vital relief to the country’s stressed foreign exchange reserves. This support comes at a time when ...

item.title: Nigeria warns of weakening radar systems that could affect air traffic safety
item.description: The Nigerian Airspace Management Agency (NAMA) don raise alarm say some radar systems wey dem dey use monitor aircraft across Naija dey show signs of weakening. Dis one fit cause wahala for air traffi...

item.title: Edmonton Oilers secure playoff spot following Winnipeg Jets defeat
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers have officially secured a berth in the NHL playoffs thanks to a loss by the Winnipeg Jets to the Philadelphia Flyers. With Montreal already confirmed in the postseason, Edmonton jo...

item.title: Rethinking South Africa’s Economic Policies in Light of Chris Hani’s Vision
item.description: This week marks the 33rd anniversary of Chris Hani’s assassination, a pivotal figure in South Africa’s liberation struggle and former General Secretary of the SACP. The article reflects on Hani’s visi...

item.title: Former Prince Andrew vacates Royal Lodge following loss of royal titles
item.description: Former Prince Andrew has completed his long-delayed move out of the Royal Lodge, a 31-bedroom mansion he had occupied for over two decades. The property, once bustling with activity, now appears deser...

item.title: UK government backs reintroduction of golden eagles to England
item.description: The UK government has pledged £1 million to support the reintroduction of golden eagles into England, aiming for the project to begin as early as next year. Once extinct in England due to 19th-century...

item.title: Concept Design for Donald Trump's Proposed Triumphal Arch Unveiled
item.description: The article supposedly discusses the unveiling of a proposed architectural design associated with former U.S. President Donald Trump, described as his 'greatest and most beautiful triumphal arch.' Whi...

item.title: Rediscovering 1960s Hong Kong fashion through my grandmother’s heirlooms
item.description: This article follows the author’s journey of rediscovering her 89-year-old grandmother’s vintage wardrobe from 1960s Hong Kong after a recent closet clean-out. As her grandmother moves into a retireme...

item.title: US-Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad End Without Agreement After 21-Hour Meeting
item.description: On Sunday, United States Vice President JD Vance announced that the recent peace talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad concluded without any agreement. The discussions lasted for 21 hours, aiming...

item.title: Israeli strikes and settler attack claim 18 lives across Lebanon, Gaza, and West Bank amid tensions
item.description: On Saturday, Israeli airstrikes and violence across Lebanon, Gaza, and the West Bank resulted in the deaths of at least 18 people, intensifying regional tensions just as potential ceasefire talks were...

item.title: US and Vatican Relations Strain After Pope Criticises American Foreign Policy
item.description: Relations between the United States and the Vatican have hit a tense point over disagreements on war, immigration, and the role of religious rhetoric in diplomacy. According to reports, a January 22 m...

item.title: Duterte camp confident despite Madriaga's scheduled impeachment testimony
item.description: The camp of Vice President Sara Duterte expressed confidence despite the upcoming testimony of Ramil Madriaga, who has admitted to being a bagman linked to her, at the House of Representatives impeach...

item.title: Punjab Cabinet approves amendment to strengthen laws against sacrilege of Guru Granth Sahib
item.description: The Punjab Cabinet, led by Chief Minister Bhagwant Singh Mann, has approved significant amendments to the Jaagat Jot Sri Guru Granth Sahib Satkar (Amendment) Bill, 2026, intensifying legal measures ag...

item.title: Florida Panthers dominate Toronto Maple Leafs in 6-2 victory
item.description: The Florida Panthers ended their losing streak with a decisive 6-2 win over the Toronto Maple Leafs on Saturday night. Eetu Luostarinen and Mackie Samoskevich each tallied a goal and two assists, whil...

item.title: US-Iran Talks in Islamabad End Without Agreement as Pakistan Mediates Peace Effort
item.description: After almost 21 hours of marathon negotiations under the 'Islamabad Talks,' US Vice President JD Vance announced that Washington and Tehran had failed to reach an agreement despite what he called 'sub...

item.title: Angel Aquino receives recognition for her performance in Taiwanese film 'APRIL' at Asian Pop-Up Cinema
item.description: Veteran Filipino actress Angel Aquino has been recognized for her outstanding performance in the Taiwanese film 'APRIL' at the Asian Pop-Up Cinema, an event that celebrates Asian cinema and its creati...

item.title: US-Iran talks in Islamabad end without agreement, Pakistan praised for mediation
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance left Islamabad on Sunday after talks with Iran failed to reach a deal, according to reports. The trilateral discussions, mediated by Pakistan, lasted nearly 21 hours. Vance ...
